context.projectOverview: Sprint 3 of Claude Opus 4.8 Support. Add an optional provider-agnostic `effort` field to ChatParams and forward it as top-level output_config.effort in the Anthropic adapter. Unset => no output_config (API default 'high' applies on Opus 4.8). Non-anthropic adapters ignore it.

completedSprints.title: SDK upgrade to 0.100.1
completedSprints.summary: @anthropic-ai/sdk now 0.100.1; OutputConfig.effort + MidConversationSystemBlockParam typed; adapter unchanged.

relevantFiles: src/providers/types.ts — ChatParams interface (add optional effort); LLMClient
src/providers/anthropic.ts — chat() builds messages.create payload; add output_config only when effort set
src/providers/anthropic.test.ts — top-level vi.mock pattern to assert request payload
src/providers/openai.ts / openai.test.ts — prove a non-anthropic adapter ignores effort without error

confirmedSdkFacts.messageCreateParams: MessageCreateParams has `output_config?: OutputConfig` — so messages.create({ ..., output_config: { effort } }) is typed, no cast needed
confirmedSdkFacts.default: effort defaults to 'high' on Opus 4.8 server-side; OMIT output_config entirely when effort is unset to preserve current behavior.

keyPrinciples: Provider-agnostic field in types.ts; @anthropic-ai/sdk stays only in anthropic.ts.
ESM .js imports; import type; no stray any.
baselineNote: Tolerated test failures: the 2 flaky 37-tool-count tests + occasionally disk.test.ts (race, passes in isolation). Any other failure, or any src/providers/ failure, is a regression.
